approval_checkpoint_scope: Baseline controls for the tested database-validation workflow. An approved client workflow may add stricter or client-specific checkpoints but must not bypass security or MCP confirmations.

human_approval_checkpoints.description: The user confirms that the combined Jira context and relevant local downloaded sources are complete enough for QA planning.
The user approves the generated SQL before it is sent to the database MCP.
The user approves switching to another database system or named profile.
The user chooses and approves the final export format before report files are generated.

mcp_boundaries.database_mcp: Database profile selection, connection checks, metadata inspection, and approved query execution only.
mcp_boundaries.workflow_layer: Coordinates external ticket inputs under downloads, generated ticket evidence under generated, shared logs, and final outputs outside MCP.
mcp_boundaries.credentials: Keep credentials in approved secret or database-profile configuration; never store them in run artifacts.
